all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Now therefore, O Lord our God, I beseech thee, save thou us out of his hand, that all the kingdoms of the earth may know that thou art the Lord God, even thou only.
2 Kings 19:19
Quote of the Day
"Through [the Savior] life becomes more hopeful and more joyful and the fruits of the Spirit are manifested in us."
Elder Ulisses Soares | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
